message:
Move DB init to lazy loading and rescan to resource route

server/app.ts was not part of the React Router build output, so the
production server.js couldn't import it. Fix by:
- Making DB initialization lazy via ensureInitialized()
- Converting /api/rescan from Express middleware to React Router route
- Using createRequestHandler directly in server.js production path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
